Now Hiring – Srikakulam District

Medical Representative Jobs in Srikakulam, Andhra Pradesh

Crasenim Pharma is hiring Medical Representatives and commission-based field sales professionals in Srikakulam district. We are the nearest major pharma company to Srikakulam — headquartered in Vizianagaram, just 50 km south. Join us and build your pharma career close to home.

📍 Srikakulam Town & District 💼 Full-Time + Commission Roles 🏠 Based near Vizianagaram HQ ✅ WHO GMP Certified Brand
💬 Apply via WhatsApp View All Openings
Territory Overview

MR Territory: Srikakulam District

Srikakulam is AP's northernmost coastal district, sharing a border with Odisha. The district's growing healthcare infrastructure — supported by a government district hospital, private nursing homes, and a wide network of rural clinics — makes it an active and expanding pharmaceutical market.

As a Crasenim Pharma MR in Srikakulam, your territory typically covers Srikakulam town plus 2–3 surrounding mandals. Narasannapeta, Palasa, Amadalavalasa, Ichapuram, and Sompeta are the key sub-markets. Because Crasenim Pharma is headquartered in neighbouring Vizianagaram, our brand is well-recognised by doctors already familiar with Crasenim products.

Key Market Areas – Srikakulam

Srikakulam Town, Narasannapeta, Palasa, Amadalavalasa, Ichapuram, Sompeta, Kaviti, Rajam

Why Srikakulam is a Good Territory

Less competitive than metros, growing rural medical network, strong GP prescription base, and proximity to Vizianagaram HQ means fast product supply and management support.

  • Less saturated than Vizag or Vijayawada — easier to establish doctor relationships
  • Growing rural healthcare utilization driving prescription volumes
  • Strong antibiotic and gastric product demand in general practice
  • Close to Vizianagaram HQ — faster sample delivery and field support
  • Commission-based roles available for those without prior pharma experience
Job Openings

Current Pharma Vacancies in Srikakulam

Medical Representative – Srikakulam Town
📍 Srikakulam Town & Mandals💼 Full-Time🕒 1–3 Years Preferred
Now Hiring
  • Promote Crasenim Pharma medicines to GPs, clinic doctors, and pharmacies in Srikakulam
  • Cover Srikakulam town and assigned surrounding mandals
  • Regular field support and product training from Vizianagaram HQ
  • Competitive salary + monthly incentives + travel allowance
Commission-Based MR – Srikakulam / Narasannapeta
📍 Srikakulam / Narasannapeta💼 Commission🕒 Any Experience
Now Hiring
  • Earn commission on every Crasenim Pharma prescription you generate in Srikakulam
  • Work alongside your current job or as your primary field role
  • Palasa, Amadalavalasa, Ichapuram sub-territories also available
  • No investment required to start
FAQs

MR Jobs in Srikakulam – FAQ

Does Crasenim Pharma have a presence in Srikakulam district?
Yes. Srikakulam is within our core coverage area. We are headquartered 50 km south in Vizianagaram, and have active MR territories and franchise partners operating in Srikakulam.
Is there a pharma job available in Palasa or Narasannapeta?
Yes. Sub-territory roles covering Narasannapeta, Palasa, Amadalavalasa, and Ichapuram are available. Contact us via WhatsApp to check specific sub-district availability.
Can I apply for both the MR job and the franchise in Srikakulam?
Yes. Srikakulam has both career openings (MR jobs) and franchise territory availability. If you're interested in both, mention it when you contact us and we'll walk you through both options. See Srikakulam franchise details →
How do I apply for MR jobs in Srikakulam?
WhatsApp your name, experience, and location to +91 99890 74806 or submit the form on our Careers page. Our HR team will call you within 2 working days.
